name: NIST Cloud Computing Forensic Reference Architecture
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-201 (2024) defines a reference architecture for forensic readiness in cloud environments — addressing the unique challenges of digital forensics when systems are virtualized, distributed, and multi-tenant.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI workload forensics in cloud environments.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).
